temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) A man in a light-colored shirt opens a dark wooden door. A red diamond-shaped paper cutting with the character '福' (fu, meaning 'good fortune') is taped to the door. The room beyond is dimly lit with a greenish hue, and a framed picture hangs on the wall next to a small, dark-colored object that looks like a fire extinguisher. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a mysterious and slightly ominous tone, introducing a key location and hinting at a significant event or person inside.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Casual, familiar. 2) Background sounds or music: Upbeat, rhythmic music with a distinct bassline begins to play.)
(00:03-00:07) An older man in a grey suit and a younger man in a patterned shirt are led into the room by another man. The older man, who appears to be the leader, is guided by the man in the patterned shirt. A third man follows behind them. The room is decorated with framed calligraphy and has a generally dated, worn-out feel. (Storyline: The arrival of the main characters, particularly the older man in the suit, establishes him as the central figure. The setting suggests a place of importance or a hideout.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Respectful, addressing the leader. 2) Background sounds or music: The upbeat, rhythmic music continues.)
